title: Save 70% of your AI Tokens
summary: Graphify is an open source tool that maps a codebase into a knowledge graph, allowing AI systems to reference the graph structure instead of re-reading the entire codebase with each prompt. This approach reduces token consumption by up to 70 percent while improving answer accuracy.
writeup: The video introduces Graphify, an open source tool that maps a codebase into a knowledge graph so AI systems can reference the graph structure rather than re-reading the entire codebase on each prompt. This matters because repeated full-codebase reads drive up token consumption and cost. The stated takeaways: the approach cuts token use by up to 70 percent and improves answer accuracy.
